response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions, but his background lacks deep focus on C++/Rust for routing/tiling pipelines or large-scale distributed systems. His geospatial work (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Sociomantic) are relevant, but the role's core requirements (C++, navigation data pipelines) are underrepresented in recent roles.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map, aligning with navigation data pipelines
Proven ability to build scalable, low-latency systems (e.g., Sociomantic's micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Strong open-source contributions and full-stack versatility, indicating adaptability to new domains
concerns: Limited recent C++/Rust experience (primary languages for the role) — last noted in 2015 at National Instruments
No explicit experience with routing/tiling data pipelines or navigation guidance systems in commercial settings
Most recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, diverging from the role's technical stack
